Charlotte's On-Demand Notary — Home, Office, or Hospital

We come to you for same-day notarizations, hospital visits, estate documents, and loan signings.

Same-Day Service • After Hours Available • Professional Signings

Our Services

Professional mobile notary and signing services delivered directly to your location.

General Mobile Notary

Standard notarizations at your home, office, or preferred location across the metro area.

General Mobile Notary in Charlotte →

Hospital & Healthcare Notary

Compassionate, discreet notarizations for patients and caregivers at medical facilities.

Hospital Notary in Charlotte →

Nursing Home & Assisted Living Notary

Mobile notary visits for residents at nursing homes, assisted living, and memory care facilities.

Nursing Home Notary in Charlotte →

Estate Planning Documents

Secure notarization for wills, trusts, living wills, and advance directives.

Estate Planning Notary in Charlotte →

After-Hours & Emergency Notary

Urgent evening and weekend appointments available when you need us most.

After-Hours Notary in Charlotte →

Power of Attorney

Legally binding notarization for financial, medical, and general POAs.

Power of Attorney Notary in Charlotte →

Loan Signing Agent

Professional mobile document signing support for real estate and mortgage appointments.

Loan Signing Agent in Charlotte →

Seller Documents

Notarization for home sellers — deeds, settlement statements, affidavits of title, and closing packages.

Seller Documents Notary in Charlotte →

Lender Documents

Signing support for refinance packages, buyer/seller packages, HELOCs, and loan modifications.

Lender Provided Documents Notary in Charlotte →

Meet Your Notary

Hi, I'm Frank Coxx, the owner of Integrity Closings CLT. With over 9 years of experience in loan signings and 20+ years in real estate, I take pride in providing accurate, stress-free notarizations — whether at your home, office, hospital, or wherever you need me.

I built this business on trust and reliability, and I treat every signing like it's my own.

980-505-8050

Mobile Notary Services in Charlotte, NC and Nearby Areas

We proudly serve Charlotte, Matthews, Mint Hill, Concord, Pineville, Monroe, and surrounding areas. If you're searching for a mobile notary near you, we come directly to your location.

Charlotte

Mint Hill, Huntersville, Cornelius, Davidson, Matthews, Pineville, Uptown and Downtown

"He did wonderful! Was very accommodating and respectful. He helped get everything situated with my family and I couldn't be more happy!"

Christopher Pearson

a year ago

"Great guy all around. If I was from down here I would have thought he was family. Helped me though the process with ease and even looked out for me. Gave advice when asked and everything. Top notch gentlemen. If I need you again. I will definitely be calling you. Thank you Mr. Cox."

a year ago

"Professional, organized, and great communication! I was very pleased with the experience and would recommend their services to friends and use again myself!"
